summary: Job Orders (BACF6-06) Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Admin page and Public confirmation page working correctly. Full workflow tested: create job order → approve → send to auditor → auditor confirms/declines.

issues: Console warnings about HTML structure (<tr> cannot be child of <span>) - cosmetic React dev warning, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation using ReportLab produces professional bilingual document (209KB)
Public confirmation page shows all job order details and declaration checkpoints
Both Confirm and Decline buttons functional with reason form for decline
Arabic RTL support working correctly throughout pages
Status badges correctly show pending_approval, pending_auditor, confirmed, rejected states
context_for_next_testing_agent: Job Orders (BACF6-06) feature is fully functional. All backend endpoints at /api/job-orders working. Admin page at /job-orders shows stats (total, pending, confirmed, rejected), table with orders, create modal with audit program/auditor selection, and view modal with details. Public confirmation page at /job-order-confirm/:accessToken shows all job order details with Confirm and Decline buttons. PDF generation works (209KB). Existing job order ID: 132bc0dc-a699-47dc-b4eb-94ef8f8c3273 with status pending_auditor.

frontend_components.job_orders_page: Admin page at /job-orders with RTL Arabic support
frontend_components.stats_cards: 4 cards showing total (1), pending (1), confirmed (0), rejected (0)
frontend_components.orders_table: Shows auditor, position, organization, audit type, date, status, actions
frontend_components.create_modal: Opens with audit program dropdown, auditor dropdown, position dropdown, audit type, date
frontend_components.view_modal: Shows auditor info, client info, manager approval status, auditor confirmation status, PDF download
frontend_components.link_modal: Shows confirmation link after sending to auditor
frontend_components.public_confirm_page: Shows job order details, declaration checkpoints, confirm/decline buttons

workflow_tested.create_approve_flow: Admin creates job order → Manager approves → Status changes to pending_auditor
workflow_tested.send_to_auditor: Admin sends confirmation link to auditor
workflow_tested.auditor_confirm: Auditor confirms via public link → Status changes to confirmed
workflow_tested.auditor_decline: Auditor declines with reason → Status changes to rejected

mocked_apis.note: No external integrations - all features are self-contained. Email sending is mocked (logs to console) but doesn't affect functionality.
